positive: A whimsical and elegant maximalist arrangement of tropical flora and mystical fauna, including bioluminescent deep-sea coral interwoven with vibrant jungle leaves (Monstera, banana leaf), surrounded by abstractly rendered, glowing celestial elements. The composition should feature a central, detailed arrangement with a balanced, radial symmetry. Use a deep jewel-tone color palette (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted by pops of neon coral and gold leaf accents. Style should be a mix of intricate Art Nouveau and psychedelic naturalism, suitable for repeating apparel print. High contrast, clean silhouettes, perfect for textile printing. Full view, centered composition, volumetric lighting, ultra-detailed, 8K, vector art feel.
